daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: dimension_order
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: Dimension order of the stored frames, over {Y,X,C,Z,T}. Default 'YXCZT'.

daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: dimension_size
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: The [Y X C Z T] extent of the image data (height, width, channels, planes, timepoints).

daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: data_type
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: Underlying numeric class of the stored pixel data (e.g. 'uint16').

daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: num_frames
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: Number of frames stored, along the ordering axes (T, and Z when present).

daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: frametimes
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: Time of each frame in epoch-clock units; NaN for clockless epochs.

daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: clocktype
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: The epoch clock type (e.g. 'dev_local_time' for a movie, 'no_time' for a clockless stack).

daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.name: metadata
daqreader_image_epochdata_ingested.documentation: Standardized image-acquisition metadata for this epoch. Fields (all time values in SECONDS): israster (logical), frame_period, line_period, dwell_time, lines_per_frame, pixels_per_line, bidirectional (logical). Timing fields are NaN when unavailable (e.g. a non-raster stack). Used to reconstruct per-line/per-pixel acquisition times.
